# Equipment Daily Inspection Record

**Inspection Unit**: Equipment Maintenance Department
**Inspection Date**: March 15, 2024
**Inspection Type**: Daily Routine Inspection
**Inspector**: Zhang San

---

## 1. Inspection Overview

This inspection covered all equipment of Automated Assembly Line A1, including CNC machining centers, robotic arm systems, material handling systems, cooling systems, and electrical control systems. The inspection started at 9:00 AM and ended at 11:30 AM.

---

## 2. Inspection Items and Results

### 2.1 CNC Machining Center Inspection

| Inspection Item | Finding | Measures | Status |
|----------------|---------|----------|--------|
| Motor Operation | Running smoothly, no abnormal sounds | Normal, continue monitoring | ✅ Normal |
| Bearing Temperature | Temperature at 42°C, within normal range | Normal, keep monitoring | ✅ Normal |
| Lubrication Oil Level | Oil level normal, no leakage | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Tool Status | Tool wear within acceptable range | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Coolant Level | Coolant level slightly low | Top up coolant | ⚠️ Processed |

**Top up coolant**: Found low coolant level in CNC machining center M-001, immediately topped up to normal level.

### 2.2 Robotic Arm System Inspection

| Inspection Item | Finding | Measures | Status |
|----------------|---------|----------|--------|
| Robotic Arm R1 Operation | Operating normally, smooth movement | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Robotic Arm R2 Operation | Operating normally | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Robotic Arm R3 Status | In standby status | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Gripper Clamping Force | Clamping force normal | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Safety Fence | Fence closed properly | Normal | ✅ Normal |

| AGV-001 Status | Power at 85%, operating normally | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| AGV-002 Status | Power at 92%, operating normally | Normal | ✅ Normal |
| Sensor Status | Sensors clean, signal normal | Normal | ✅ Normal |

---

## 3. Abnormality Summary

### 3.1 Processed Abnormalities

| No. | Equipment | Abnormality Description | Measures | Result |
|------|-----------|------------------------|----------|--------|
| 1 | CNC Machining Center M-001 | Coolant level low | Top up coolant | Restored |

---

## 4. Inspection Summary

### 4.1 Overall Evaluation

Overall inspection was good, all equipment operating normally. Only one minor abnormality found (low coolant level), which was processed on-site.

### 4.2 Suggestions

1. Recommend increasing coolant level monitoring frequency to prevent recurrence
2. AGV-001 power consumption relatively fast, recommend checking battery status
3. Recommend regular sensor cleaning to ensure detection accuracy

### 4.3 Next Inspection Plan

- Inspection Date: March 18, 2024
- Inspection Type: Weekly Inspection
- Key Focus: Cooling system operation status, AGV battery endurance capability
